title: Savory Crumbly Cheese Crock
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring cheese and fermented flavors in a crumbly texture, suitable for pescatarian diets.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: For added heat, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: 1 small zucchini, finely grated
ingredients.notes: Use any summer squash if zucchini is unavailable.

instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a mixing bowl.
Transfer mixture into an ungreased 8x8 inch baking dish and spread evenly.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and slightly crispy on top.
Let it cool for about 5 minutes before serving.
